2335170.name: Romancelvania Soundtrack
2335170.description: Romancelvania’s original soundtrack is over 2 hours of music that is as eclectic as the game itself. Classic horror instrumentation like pipe organ and theremin are present, but there are also classical strings, shred-metal lead guitar, electronica dance beats, beatnik jazz sax, thunderous drums, soothing harp, not-so-soothing accordian, 12-string acoustic guitar, hippie drum circles, plucky harpsichord, kitsch-y 50’s vibraphone, Alpine horn (and yodeling!), analog synthesizers, opera singers, down-n-dirty blues harmonica, a men’s chorus, Italian mandolins, funk bass, 8-bit chip-tunes, Jamaican steel drums, Japanese shakuhachi flute, Persian Santur and other exotic world instruments… even a medley of Christmas carols.
